# AdServingStateReasons

**Type**

Reasons the system provides when an ad isn’t running.

## Declaration

```swift
string AdServingStateReasons
```

## Data Types

- **AdStatus**: The user-controlled status of the ad.
- **AdServingStatus**: The status of whether the ad is serving.
